turns.user_message: I just feel this weird, heavy tiredness in my chest lately. It makes everything seem a bit harder.
That heavy feeling is there every single morning now. I feel like I'm moving through thick mud just to get started.
The weight in my chest is so constant it's like I can't take a full breath anymore. My whole body just feels drained and heavy all the time.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens by describing a physical feeling. This just started recently.
